author: jdthomas24
description: Pentair IntelliCenter local integration for Hubitat
releaseNotes: v1.5.8 — Fixed Body driver on() calling non-existent method (caused MissingMethodException on dashboard switch tap). Fixed Heat Lock warning message showing wrong command name. Fixed stale v1.5.4 log strings in Body driver. Fixed Bridge watchdog firing immediately on first boot. Fixed IC2 firmware compatibility — WriteParamList changes field now guarded as List. Fixed Bridge writing endpointBase setting on every state push. Fixed Parent App componentRefresh routing all device types correctly through Bridge.
